{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ruby's Goldsigns
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ruby's Goldsigns]] can stab [[Lindon]] in the side.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
